name: code_structure
description: List functions, structs, classes, interfaces, traits, enums in source files with --summary for compact counts and --grep=PATTERN to filter by name.

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into before analyzing

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: One or more source files to analyze

parameters.name: --summary,-s
parameters.description: Compact one-line summary with counts per category

examples.expected: Shows compact counts of functions/types per file

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses repeated grep-for-function/struct calls into a single step; --dir eliminates separate cd step.
